import json, sys, os, re, unicodedata
p="/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
data=json.load(open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8"))
len(data)

# Load data already in 'data'
orig_full = "وَإِنْ يَمْسَسْكَ اللَّهُ بِضُرٍّ فَلا كَاشِفَ لَهُ إِلاَّ هُوَ وَإِنْ يُرِدْكَ بِخَيْرٍ فَلا رَادَّ لِفَضْلِهِ"
snippet = "وَإِنْ يَم...لِفَضْلِهِ"

# normalization function
import re
def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tashkeel (diacritics) and tatweel and punctuation, unify hamza, alifs etc, lowercase
    # Arabic diacritics range: \u0610-\u061a \u064b-\u065f \u0670 \u06d6-\u06dc \u06df-\u06e8 \u06ea-\u06ed
    # but simpler remove combining marks: Mn
    text = re.sub(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0610-\u061A\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', text)  # removes common diacritics
    text = text.replace('ـ','')  # tatweel
    # unify hamza forms to bare ا? We'll map آ أ إ to ا, and ؤ ئ ء to و ي ا? But better map all hamza variants to ء.
    # However many normalization schemes: convert آ أ إ to ا, and keep ء,ؤ,ئ as same maybe to ء
    text = text.replace('آ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا')
    text = text.replace('ؤ','ء').replace('ئ','ء')
    # remove punctuation (Arabic and ascii)
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0621-\u064A\u0660-\u0669\s]', '', text)  # keep Arabic letters and numbers and underscore and whitespace
    # replace english digits etc? Keep numbers
    # replace multiple spaces with single
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text)
    return text.strip().lower()

norm_orig_full = normalize_ar(orig_full)
norm_orig_full

# Build normalized ayah list
norm_texts = []
for i,entry in enumerate(data):
    t = entry['ayah_text']
    nt = normalize_ar(t)
    norm_texts.append((i, entry['surah_name'], entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], t, nt))

# search for normalized substring
matches = [e for e in norm_texts if norm_orig_full in e[5]]
len(matches)

# compute token F1 similarity
candidate = matches[0][4]  # exact ayah_text with tashkeel
norm_candidate = normalize_ar(candidate)
norm_full = norm_orig_full

def token_f1(a,b):
    atoks = a.split()
    btoks = b.split()
    aset = {}
    for t in atoks:
        aset[t]=aset.get(t,0)+1
    matched = 0
    for t in btoks:
        if aset.get(t,0)>0:
            matched += 1
            aset[t]-=1
    if len(atoks)==0 or len(btoks)==0:
        return 0.0
    prec = matched/len(atoks)
    rec = matched/len(btoks)
    if prec+rec==0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

sim = token_f1(norm_candidate, norm_full)
sim

norm_snippet = normalize_ar(snippet)
norm_snippet, norm_candidate, token_f1(norm_candidate, norm_snippet), lcs_len(norm_candidate.split(), norm_snippet.split())/max(1,len(norm_snippet.split()))
